headline: Woman's 'I'm Not A Regular Mom, I'm A Cool Mom' T-Shirt Is The Least Cool Thing She Owns
summary: Her kids have asked her to 'please stop.' She's bought matching shirts for them.
fullBody: Amanda CoolMom bought an 'I'm not a regular mom, I'm a cool mom' shirt. Her children are mortified. 'Mom, please,' her 14-year-old said. Amanda bought matching shirts for the whole family. 'We're cool now,' Amanda said. They are not. Her kids have started wearing hoodies over the shirts. Amanda is now 'cool mom' in the group chat. The chat has muted her. She's 'processing.'
